name: Allianz SE
lede: Allianz runs five capability centers across two Indian cities. Pune and Thiruvananthapuram, covering gcc/gic, ssc and sales & marketing, built over 23 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Allianz office in India. We map five, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Allianz SE GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Allianz runs 5 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Pune, Thiruvananthapuram), covering gcc/gic, ssc and sales & marketing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Allianz's India footprint covers Pune and Thiruvananthapuram, spanning gcc/gic, ssc and sales & marketing. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 47 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Allianz operate in India?
faq.a: Allianz operates 5 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Allianz have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Allianz's India GCC footprint spans Pune and Thiruvananthapuram.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Allianz run in India?
faq.a: Allianz runs gcc/gic, ssc and sales & marketing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Allianz's India GCCs?
faq.a: Allianz's India centers employ in the 5,000 to 10,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Allianz's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 47 leaders at Allianz's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
